description: 2. Get a console device resource for a tenant
examples:
Command Example
!cylance-protect-get-devices pageNumber=2 pageSize=75
Raw Output
{
"agent_version":"2.0.1440",
"date_first_registered":"2018-01-21T15:45:42",
"id":"652bbfa9-cf74-4e24-90f7-d01b16429701",
"ip_addresses":[
name: cylance-protect-get-device

outputs.description: CylancePROTECT Agent version installed on the device CylanceProtect.Device.DateFirstRegistered Date and time (in UTC) when the device record was created
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.AgentVersion

outputs.description: If true , the agent is running
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.BackgroundDetection

outputs.description: Date and time (in UTC) when the device record was last modified CylanceProtect.Device.DateOffline Date and time (in UTC) when the device last communicated with the console
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.DateLastModified

outputs.description: Hostname for the device CylanceProtect.Device.ID Unique identifier for the device
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.Hostname

outputs.description: List of IP addresses for the device CylanceProtect.Device.MACAddress List of MAC addresses for the device
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.IPAddress

outputs.description: If true , there are no outstanding threats
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.IsSafe

outputs.description: If true , there is available update for the device
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.UpdateAvailable

outputs.description: List of MAC addresses for the device Endpoint.IPAddress List of IP addresses for the device
outputs.name: Endpoint.MACAddress

outputs.description: Device OS version CylanceProtect.Device.OSVersion Device OS version
outputs.name: Endpoint.OSVersion
